/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zepra-demo.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/zepra-demo.dir/zepra_demo.cpp.o" -o zepra-demo  /home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/tools/../source/webCore/build/libwebcore.a /home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/tools/../source/networking/build/libnetworking.a /home/swana/Documents/zeprabrowser/tools/../source/zepraScript/build/lib/libzepra-core.a -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lSDL2_ttf /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
